title: dysoxylum hasseltii
intro: Dysoxylum hasseltii, also known as the Hasselt's Dysoxylum, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Meliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dysoxylum hasseltii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cough and respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Dysoxylum hasseltii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, decoctions, and infusions, making it a valuable natural remedy in traditional Asian medicine.
